steps.description: Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code while viewing the "Preview README.md" interface.
Type 'Debug: Select and Start Debugging' into the Command Palette search box in Visual Studio Code. The Command Palette is accessed via the top center overlay, indicated with a > symbol.
Press the Enter key to select the "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" option from the VS Code command palette.
Type text 'Debug in Microsoft 365 Agents Playground' into the configuration dropdown menu of Visual Studio Code, located at the top-center of the interface.
Press the 'Enter' key to confirm the selection of "Debug in Microsoft 365 Agents Playground" from the debug configuration dropdown in Visual Studio Code.
